Name: FPrimaryAssetTypeInfo
Description: Structure with publicly exposed information about an asset type. These can be loaded out of a config file.

Variables.Name: PrimaryAssetType
Variables.Description: The logical name for this type of Primary Asset

Variables.Name: AssetBaseClass
Variables.Description: Base Class of all assets of this type

Variables.Name: AssetBaseClassLoaded
Variables.Description: Base Class of all assets of this type

Variables.Name: bHasBlueprintClasses
Variables.Description: True if the assets loaded are blueprints classes, false if they are normal UObjects

Variables.Name: bIsEditorOnly
Variables.Description: True if this type is editor only

Variables.Name: Directories
Variables.Description: Directories to search for this asset type

Variables.Name: Rules
Variables.Description: Default management rules for this type, individual assets can be overridden

Variables.Name: AssetScanPaths
Variables.Description: Combination of directories and individual assets to search for this asset type. Will have the Directories and Assets added to it

Variables.Name: bIsDynamicAsset
Variables.Description: True if this is an asset created at runtime that has no on disk representation. Cannot be set in config

Variables.Name: NumberOfAssets
Variables.Description: Number of tracked assets of that type
